data.name: LustyVerse: Passion on Display
data.about_the_game:
In Passion on Display you play as a young man, working his way through college.

With a broken heart, you mostly avoid parties and lead a rather boring and uneventful life.
One day, all of that changes with the arrival of a new neighbor, Samantha.

You and your roommate, Hailey, quickly learn that Samantha isn't like the other girls. With a little help of your new friend, you get out of your cocoon and start living the proper college life.

Meet Hailey, your roommate. You've know her for so long, you practically see her as one of the boy's. But with your newly opened eyes, she soon starts being more than just a friend...

Samantha is the new hot neighbor that lives next door. Looks, brains, money? She's got it all. But not everything is as it seems on the surface.

Becky... Well, let's not talk too much about her.

....and a few more.

Game Content:

  • 10.699 IMAGES

  • 303 ANIMATIONS

Gameplay:

  • Define the relationships within the game

  • Slut angle

  • Nude Mode

  • Lust Time

  • Change angle

  • Multiple Endings

WARNING!

This game is for ADULTS only and it includes explicit, sexual content that some viewers may find offensive. The characters shown in the game are all over 18 years old.
data.short_description: As a young college student, you live a mostly mundane life of studying, working and hanging out. However, that all changes when a new girl moves in next door. With her arrival, you start to spend your free time very differently, resulting in many dramatic and interesting twists and turns.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 7 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X Yosemite 10.10
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9, OpenGL ES 2 or WebGL
  • 儲存空間: 7 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 7 GB 可用空間
